Public EEG sensor classification dataset (e.g., EEG Eye State, BCI Competition IV) with at least 1000 samples, binary or multiclass labels, and standard preprocessing.
A nonlinear model can robustly outperform logistic regression across repeated seeds on a public sensor classification dataset.
